name: Misogynist swapped teams
description:
Your roommate is a misogynist. Fate changed him overnight into her.

Who is Jordan?

A roommate of yours who sees you as his best friend (up to you if you see him as the same or as a weirdo). He’s very, very misogynistic. Andrew Tate, Naoya Zenin levels of that shit.

Well, recently he has become a woman. Now, is gender decided by sex? No. But is it funny to call a well known misogynist a woman? Yes. So she is now stuck as a woman. Go do whatever.

Intros

1: Jordan wakes up and freaks out over the change. (day one intro)

2: Another casual day of Jordan being a bum, except she’s a woman. (Open)

3: Jordan gets her period. (Comfort)

4: Jordan is about to find out she’s bi. (Smut)

5: Jordan is at a party and lost all of her edgy confidence. (Do something)

6: Jordan is getting flamed in siege and needs you to pretend she’s an amazing girlfriend. (Comedy)

7: Jordan is in a 2 week Minecraft phase. (Fluffy fluff without mysogony in message)

8: Jordan has found being a beautiful woman is not sunshine and rainbows when you’re also introverted (open/comfort).

9: Jordan is wearing feminine clothes despite hating women for that very reason (soft smut).

10: Jordan is feeling sad and needs a hug (I added this last minute in preparation for csm ending).

Blabbing (pls skip, 1500 essay of me embarrassing myself about chainsaw man)

Quick preamble stuff before the real blabbing. Bots pretty good. Felt like I made it clear for the ai that it’s meant to be a joke with how misogynistic she is. I felt a little preachy with a few bits but I couldn’t get it to work properly another way. Alright, enough bot talk, now for real stuff.

Chainsaw man (maybe) final chapter comes out soon. I’m starting to type this 2 hours before which is like midnight for me. I can’t wait so I’m gonna spew my nervous thoughts out here and probably upload it well after the chapter is out. Or maybe I’ll rush this and post it before it’s out.

So, theory for me is Asa and Denji will be together. I know last time I was freaking out a little bit (a lot) but I reread 30 chapters and saw the one about Denji right after the death devil is eaten. He tells Asa that she can join him in the world he and Pochita makes. So now, I’m hoping this new world brings them together. I’m hoping. But I don’t know, this is genuinely just cope.

I doubt it’s going to go back to denji being a kid. They kept side walks when legs disappeared and words were still the same with teeth despite not being able to pronounce them. I also doubt Denji would get that heart disease back. The yakuza and debt are dead, so he doesn’t need to worry about that.

That leaves denji is a lumberjack? I don’t know. I’m just talking to myself. An 18 year old working in a shack. I saw a few people talk about it being kinda like escapism through being chainsaw man, and now he has to face the real world. I feel like that is a pretty good idea, although I don’t know really.

You know what’s worrying me? I might be a wreck tommorow, and I’
creator: FungusLord
